field_semantics.shortTermScore: Alias of shortTermConvictionScore for current UI group-score consumers.
field_semantics.shortTermConvictionScore: Directional short-term mean: technical flow, volume/liquidity trend, relative strength, options-activity proxy, and inverted short-volume pressure when present. Off-exchange activity is excluded because it is non-directional.
field_semantics.shortTermCommonBasisScore: Mean of the same three current axes (technical flow, volume/liquidity trend, and relative strength) when all are present. This is a composition disclosure, not a cross-market-comparable score.
field_semantics.shortTermInputCount: Actual number of inputs used by shortTermConvictionScore; null when the required common three-input basis is unavailable.
field_semantics.shortTermBasisCode: common_3_v1 for three common inputs; us_enriched_v1 when one or two US-only enrichment inputs are also present.
field_semantics.volumeLiquidityTrendScore: Local OHLCV volume/liquidity trend proxy, not true order flow.
field_semantics.shortTermRelativeStrengthScore: Local 20d/60d relative-strength proxy versus SPY, not a forecast.
field_semantics.netOptionsProxyScore: OCC listed-options volume skew proxy derived from underlying-level call/put quantities; not real options flow, not OPRA, and not buyer/seller direction.
field_semantics.offExchangeActivityProxyScore: FINRA reported off-exchange activity proxy; not ATS-only dark-pool flow and not directional intent.
field_semantics.shortPressureProxyScore: FINRA reported short-sale volume pressure proxy; not short interest, borrow fee, utilization, or buy/sell direction.
field_semantics.directCorpusToneProxyScore: Private/admin only; never included in this public summary.
